case_title: THE STATE BAR OF CALIFORNIA VS. DAN WAYNE GORDON

docket_entries.description: SUMMARY JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE STATE BAR OF CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT GORDON, DAN WAYNE (SBN 99715) JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

PROOF OF SERVICE OF REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT, JUDGMENT,AND NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMNT BY THE STATE BAR FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE STATE BAR OF CALIFORNIA SERVED MAY-12-2009, MAIL AS TO DEFENDANT GORDON, DAN WAYNE (SBN 99715)
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF THE STATE BAR OF CALIFORNIA

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE STATE BAR OF CALIFORNIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GORDON, DAN WAYNE (SBN 99715) $3,626.39 PRINCIPAL, $200.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,826.39, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
